name: Harvest Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix sweet potatoes, brown sugar, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Whisk together the remaining ingredients (eggs, yogurt, milk, and melted butter) except pecan halves and whipping cream.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Arrange pecan halves in a decorative circle around the edge of the pie, if desired.
6. Bake the pie in the center of the oven for 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean and the crust is golden brown.
7. Let the pie cool on a wire rack until room temperature.
8. Serve with sweetened whipped cream.
